notes: All entities listed as alleged unless a court conviction is noted. Amounts from DOJ plea agreement and Brazilian Lava Jato cooperation records.

companies.name: Odebrecht S.A. (Sucursal Argentina)
companies.notes: Brazilian parent pled guilty to FCPA conspiracy (Dec 2016). Argentine subsidiary under investigation.

companies.name: Iecsa S.A.
companies.notes: Partner in Consorcio Nuevo Sarmiento for soterramiento. Formerly owned by Macri family, sold to Angelo Calcaterra in 2007.

companies.name: Benito Roggio e Hijos S.A.
companies.notes: Member of AYSA Paraná de las Palmas water plant consortium.

companies.name: Supercemento S.A.I.C.
companies.notes: Member of AYSA Paraná de las Palmas water plant consortium.

companies.name: José Cartellone Construcciones Civiles S.A.
companies.notes: Member of AYSA Paraná de las Palmas water plant consortium.

companies.name: Ghella S.p.A.
companies.notes: Italian firm, 30% stake in Consorcio Nuevo Sarmiento.

companies.name: Comsa S.A.
companies.notes: Spanish firm, 10% stake in Consorcio Nuevo Sarmiento.

intermediaries.name: Structured Operations Division (Odebrecht)
intermediaries.notes: Internal Odebrecht unit dedicated to covert bribe payments, known as 'Departamento de Operações Estruturadas'. Used codenames for recipients.

projects.name: Soterramiento del Ferrocarril Sarmiento
projects.notes: Awarded Jan 2008 to Consorcio Nuevo Sarmiento (Iecsa 30%, Odebrecht 30%, Ghella 30%, Comsa 10%). Alleged US$4.5M+ channeled via Iecsa through fictitious contract with Spanish company DSC to Andorra. Codenames 'Gardelón' and 'Mudinho' used for alleged recipients.

projects.name: Planta Potabilizadora Paraná de las Palmas (AYSA)
projects.notes: Awarded to consortium of Odebrecht, Benito Roggio, Supercemento, and Cartellone. Original value US$880M, costs reportedly escalated significantly. Bribe amount estimated from DOJ total allocation.

projects.name: Ampliación Gasoductos TGN y TGS
projects.notes: Expansion of Transportadora de Gas del Norte and Transportadora de Gas del Sur networks. Odebrecht acknowledged US$25M in bribes for gas pipeline contracts in Brazil cooperation records. De Vido and Cameron prosecuted.

politicians.name: Julio De Vido
politicians.notes: Prosecuted for alleged irregular favoritism toward Odebrecht in gas pipeline and AYSA contracts. Charges pending.

politicians.name: José Francisco López
politicians.notes: Accused in connection with AYSA water treatment plant irregularities.

politicians.name: Roberto Baratta
politicians.position: Subsecretario de Coordinación, Ministerio de Planificación
politicians.notes: Accused in connection with AYSA water treatment plant irregularities.

politicians.name: Daniel Cameron
politicians.notes: Prosecuted alongside De Vido for alleged favoritism in gas pipeline contracts with Odebrecht.

politicians.name: Ricardo Jaime
politicians.notes: An Odebrecht cooperating witness alleged US$20M in bribes paid via Calcaterra to Jaime for the Sarmiento burial project.
